elements.text: You’ve noticed that your partner and children have started to care for you more often. Now, they often end conversations by asking if you need or want anything. While this dynamic is very different from the past, you understand that they want to be helpful, and it is...

elements.name: new_roles--early_mid-stage_symptoms--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
